Not bad, but maybe I can do better.

I need to decide whether to change my working hours today to improve my rankings. Let me think about why I might be averaging. Maybe I'm not optimizing when I work. Some riders might start earlier or finish later to catch more orders during peak times. Or perhaps I'm covering the same area as others, making competition tough.

I should consider peak hours. Usually, lunchtime and dinner time are busy. If I adjust my schedule to cover these peaks, maybe I can get more orders. Let me see: starting earlier at 7 AM could help me grab those morning orders before others do. Ending later at 8 PM might catch the evening rush when people order dinner or夜宵 (night snacks).

Alternatively, maybe sticking to the same hours is fine since it's average. But if others are working longer and getting better stats, then changing could help me improve my rankings. Let's go with adjusting the schedule a bit. Starting an hour earlier and finishing two hours later might give me that edge. Plus, I can plan my routes better during those extended times to maximize earnings.

So, today, I'll start at 7 AM and finish at 8 PM. Hopefully, this adjustment will help me increase the number of orders, distance ridden, and money earned. Let's see how it goes.
